name: agent-skill
description: Harness builder, visual-QA, thrift, exploration, and debugging skills for Claude Code plus platform ports

plugins.name: harness-builder
plugins.description: Bootstrap CLAUDE.md, .claude/agents/, hooks, and plugin wiring with /agent-init

plugins.name: harness-floor
plugins.description: Cost-unrestricted patterns starting with /visual-qa (visual regression + LLM analysis via Playwright MCP)

plugins.name: harness-builder-codex
plugins.description: Run agent-init for Codex CLI projects — emits AGENTS.md + .codex/skills/

plugins.name: harness-builder-copilot
plugins.description: Run agent-init for GitHub Copilot CLI — emits .github/copilot-instructions.md + AGENTS.md

plugins.name: harness-builder-gemini
plugins.description: Run agent-init for Gemini CLI (a.k.a. 'antigravity') — emits GEMINI.md + .gemini/skills/

plugins.name: harness-floor-codex
plugins.description: visual-qa scaffold for Codex CLI — emits .visual-qa.json + Playwright MCP entry

plugins.name: harness-thrift
plugins.description: Theme B — cost-conscious long-session optimisation: context-mode integration, prompt cache priming, summariser hooks, end-of-session audit

plugins.name: harness-thrift-cursor
plugins.description: Theme B port for Cursor — advisory-only thrift via .cursor/rules/thrift.mdc

plugins.name: harness-thrift-copilot
plugins.description: Theme B port for GitHub Copilot CLI — file-backed thrift state + official .github/hooks/ patches

plugins.name: harness-thrift-codex
plugins.description: Theme B port for Codex CLI — TOML-aware ~/.codex/config.toml patcher + OpenAI rate table

plugins.name: harness-debug-codex
plugins.description: Theme E port for Codex CLI — prompt-level systematic debugging with structured error parsing, .debug-state.json persistence, and git/input bisection

plugins.name: harness-thrift-gemini
plugins.description: Theme B port for Gemini CLI — Vertex AI rate table with min-token + storage-hour terms

plugins.name: harness-explore
plugins.description: Theme D — codebase exploration: parallel-dispatch tree-walker + dependency graph, cached by git HEAD, /explore where + /explore deps queries

plugins.name: harness-debug
plugins.description: Theme E — systematic debugging: reproduce → isolate → hypothesize → verify workflow with .debug-state.json checkpointing + 10-format error parser + bisection lib

plugins.name: harness-data
plugins.description: Data analysis harness for notebook execution, SQL validation, artifact diffs, and durable verification evidence
